name: Aerodrome Finance

supply.notes: Supply is uncapped with ongoing emissions. Launched Aug 2023 with 500M, 450M (90%) locked as veAERO.

events.notes: Minor ongoing emission event post-vesting completion

unlocks.summary: Major vesting completed Aug 28, 2025. Team locked for 2-4 years as veAERO. April 30 unlock is negligible rebase event (12 AERO). No further major team/foundation unlocks announced.
unlocks.data_quality: High - vesting completed, governance-controlled emissions from epoch 67+
unlocks.caveats: Unlock data limited by blocked access to DefiLlama/Tokenomist. Current schedule relies on April 30 event from public sources. Recommend on-chain verification for future epoch-based emissions.

lock_mechanism.name: veAERO
benefits: 100% of trading fees from voted pools

trading_fees.description: 100% of trading fees flow to veAERO holders voting for those pools

bribes.description: Protocols incentivize veAERO votes with bribes in various tokens
bribes.notes: Bribes can exceed trading fees in competitive periods, primary yield source varies weekly

dilution_for_non_locked.description: Unlocked AERO holders face heavy dilution from emissions, no fee/bribe capture
dilution_for_non_locked.current_annualized_inflation_estimate: 11-35% depending on epoch and lock percentage
dilution_for_non_locked.net_inflation_with_locks: 8% as of late 2025 (fees/locks offset some emission dilution)

weekly_emission_adjustment_options: Increase by 0.01% of total supply (+52 bps annualized)
Decrease by 0.01% of total supply (-52 bps annualized)

current_estimated_rates.notes: As of Q4 2024-Q1 2026 transition. Phase 3 governance control enables dynamic rates.

revenue_efficiency.notes: Record efficiency as of Aug 2025. Locking drives net supply reduction despite emissions.

data_collection_notes: Data collected April 29, 2026 from public web sources (CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, Tokenomics.com, Nansen, Bitget, TastyCrypto, CoinGecko Learn). AERO is a ve(3,3) fork on Base chain launched Aug 2023. Key mechanics: (1) Uncapped supply with phase-based emissions until epoch 67, then governance-controlled via AERO Fed; (2) veAERO locks capture 100% of trading fees + bribes = real yield; (3) Unlocked AERO holders suffer dilution; (4) Allocation: 66.69% gauge emissions, 9.8% airdrop, 8.3% team (split initial/new mint), 5.17% rebase, 5.15% ecosystem, 2.45% protocol grants, 1.96% voter incentives, 0.49% genesis LP. Team/foundation locked 2-4 years as veAERO (no liquid vesting). Major vesting completed Aug 28, 2025. Next unlock April 30, 2026 is trivial (12 AERO rebase). Inflation calculation conservative: 11% annualized on circulating supply as of late 2025; actual inflation varies by week and lock ratio. Revenue efficiency $1.50/$1 emitted (fees + bribes sustain veAERO holders despite dilution to non-locked). Recommend on-chain verification of current epoch, weekly emission rate, and circulating supply for live analysis.
